nasb.text: Those that entered, male and female of all flesh, entered as God had commanded him; and the Lord closed it behind him.

esv.text: And those that entered, male and female of all flesh, went in as God had commanded him. And the Lord shut him in.

cnv.text: 那些進去的，都是有生命的，一公一母進去，是照著　神吩咐挪亞的。耶和華跟著就把方舟關起來。

csbs.text: 各样有血肉的，都是公母成双进去的，是照着神所吩咐挪亚的话进去的。然后耶和华在挪亚后面关上了门。
